name: Mothers Nougat
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy-bottomed 2-quart saucepan, cook water and sugar until the syrup moves away from the bottom.
2. Add honey and cook down by one-third.
3. Whip egg whites until soft peaks form and add cream of tartar.
4. Gradually add powdered sugar and beat until stiff peaks form, then add to the honey mixture in spoonfuls.
5. Transfer the mixture to a double boiler and cook, stirring constantly, for 15-20 minutes until it cooks down slightly.
6. Beat until the mixture looks dry.
7. Stir in chopped nuts and cool.
8. Spread a wafer with about one-quarter of the honey mixture, approximately three-fourths of an inch thick, on a waxed paper-covered work surface.
9. Cover with a second wafer and press down evenly.
10. Spread another quarter of the honey mixture on the second wafer and top with a third wafer.
11. Repeat to make a second nougat.
12. Wrap each one tightly in heavy foil and refrigerate overnight.
13. Trim off the edges and cut into 3/4-inch strips.
14. Cut each strip diagonally into 2-1/2-inch pieces.
15. Serve with tea.
